title: transport: verify relay pub_id matches identity after auth
description: open_authenticated_ws() in core/src/transport.rs (line 441-447) receives the relay-returned pub_id from the AuthenticateResult and only logs it -- it never checks it against identity.pub_id() computed locally. The WASM client (wasm/src/client.rs lines 96-104) performs this check and is correct. A compromised relay could return an arbitrary pub_id in the auth response; downstream code that caches the relay-returned value (rather than recomputing it from identity.pub_id()) would trust the wrong identity. DESIGN.md invariant 21 documents this check as mandatory. Fix: after receiving a non-error auth response, compute identity.pub_id() locally and return Err if it does not match the relay-returned value.
